expectations.text: References the existing feature-dev skill directly rather than answering generically.
expectations.evidence: Response is generic and does not cite concrete file/section details.

expectations.text: Avoids asking blocking clarifying questions for this well-specified task.
Proposes concrete description and body changes, including a scoped 'When not to use this skill' addition.
expectations.evidence: Suggests description update and adding a not-to-use section.

expectations.text: Scales the workflow to the task instead of insisting on a full multi-phase approval process.
expectations.evidence: Keeps response short and directly actionable.
